strengths: Multiple angles (wide exterior, interior walkthrough, close-up roofing)
Good progression showing the work being done
Before/during content performs well on all platforms
improvements: Cut the black opening — start with the most dramatic shot immediately
Add bold text overlay in first 2s (e.g. "We replaced this entire roof in 1 day")
Trim to 30-45s for IG Reels/TikTok/Shorts (current 1:13 is too long for algorithm push)
Add before/after split if you have the footage
Add voiceover or music — silent renovation clips get skipped
Close-up shingle shot is strong — consider opening with it

suggestedLength.tiktok: 21-34s (sweet spot for viral, completion rate peaks here)
suggestedLength.youtube: 30-60s (Shorts algo rewards 20-60s, 50-60s gets 22x more views than <10s)

captions.instagram:
This is what real estate investing looks like behind the scenes 🏠🔨

New roof. New life. This property needed serious work — so we got a crew up there and handled it.

Most people talk about passive income. Few show you the sweat equity that gets you there.

Would you take on a project like this? 👇
